content: {"file": "backend/api/routers/ado.py", "summary": "This file contains an API router for handling GET requests to retrieve the status of a job in relation to ADO (Azure DevOps) results. It uses FastAPI and interacts with a runner module to fetch job state, returning ADO results and any errors encountered.", "rules": [{"name": "get_ado_status", "description": "Retrieve the status of an ADO job by its ID.", "conditions": ["job_id is provided as path parameter"], "actions": ["Call get_job_state with job_id to fetch job state", "Raise HTTP 404 if job state is None", "Return {'ado_results': state['ado_results'], 'errors': state['errors']}"]}], "dependencies": ["fastapi", "pipeline.runner"]}
